system.description: Members of the Jedi Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.

These are simple robes, kept modest not by a desire to appear humble, but to offer the greatest freedom of movement during battle. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.
Members of the Jedi Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.

These are simple robes, kept modest not by a desire to appear humble, but to offer the greatest freedom of movement during battle. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.
Members of the Jedi Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.

These are simple robes, kept modest not by a desire to appear humble, but to offer the greatest freedom of movement during battle. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but this variant offers the additional protection needed by Jedi influencing important events. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes offer good protection with no hindrance to movement. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but this variant offers the additional protection needed by Jedi influencing important events. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes offer good protection with no hindrance to movement. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but this variant offers the additional protection needed by Jedi influencing important events. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes offer good protection with no hindrance to movement. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but Jedi Masters also know the importance of adequate protection when great challenges must be surmounted. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.

These robes offer superior protection while still allowing full freedom of movement. They are the robes of the true masters, those whose will and authority go unopposed. Tailored for those who walk the Guardian's path, favoring strength and martial discipline.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but Jedi Masters also know the importance of adequate protection when great challenges must be surmounted. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.

These robes offer superior protection while still allowing full freedom of movement. They are the robes of the true masters, those whose will and authority go unopposed. Tailored for those who walk the Sentinel's path, favoring cunning and adaptability.

Members of the Order typically wear plain or unassuming garments, but Jedi Masters also know the importance of adequate protection when great challenges must be surmounted. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.

These robes offer superior protection while still allowing full freedom of movement. They are the robes of the true masters, those whose will and authority go unopposed. Tailored for those who walk the Consular's path, favoring wisdom and Force-attunement.
